headline: Eni and Halliburton Achieve Industry First With Closed-Loop Rig Automation in Deepwater Indonesia
summary: HOUSTON, July 09, 2026--Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) today announced the successful deployment of LOGIX™ automation and remote operations on a deepwater exploration well with Eni offshore Indonesia. The operation marks a series of industry and regional firsts that advance closed loop drilling automation and demonstrate performance at scale in complex offshore environments.

headline: What Does HAL’s Board Loss Mean for Its Governance and Risk Oversight Story?
summary: Halliburton recently announced the passing of long-serving director Abdulaziz F. Al Khayyal, who had been on the board since 2014 and sat on both the Audit Committee and the Health, Safety and Environment Committee. His death removes a board member with deep industry and risk oversight experience at a time when Halliburton is expanding complex international projects and operating in a volatile geopolitical backdrop. With that in mind, we’ll now examine how the loss of this board experience...

headline: Apple Hands Broadcom a $30 Billion Lifeline as Trump Declares the Iran Ceasefire Dead
summary: Broadcom rallied on a $30 billion Apple chip commitment and Nvidia climbed on a value case, while a weak Amazon bond sale hinted at cooling AI-capex appetite. Overnight, Trump declared the Iran ceasefire over and U.S. strikes on more than 80 targets sent oil and Treasury yields higher heading into Thursday's open.

headline: Halliburton (HAL) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of oilfield services company Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) jumped 2.9% in the afternoon session after President Trump declared the Iran ceasefire "over" and threatened fresh strikes, sending oil prices sharply higher and lifting the broad energy complex.
